title: Certification expiration badge
description: Traffic-light HeroUI Chip showing days_until_expiry for a certification. Renders in four states: green (> 90d), yellow (30-90d), red (< 30d), grey-strikethrough (expired). When expires_at is null, renders 'Does not expire'.

compact.description: When true, renders icon-only (uses tooltip for label).

children.$expr: $params.expires_at == null ? 'Does not expire' : ($params.is_expired ? 'Expired' : ($params.days_until_expiry < 30 ? 'Expires in ' + $params.days_until_expiry + ' days' : ($params.days_until_expiry < 90 ? 'Expires in ' + $params.days_until_expiry + ' days' : 'Expires in ' + $params.days_until_expiry + ' days')))
